title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 210.257 - Rules, procedure to adopt
text:
210.257.  Rules, procedure to adopt. — No rule or portion of a rule promulgated under the authority of section 210.252 shall become effective unless it has been promulgated pursuant to the provisions of section 536.024.
(L. 1993 H.B. 376 § 4, A.L. 1995 S.B. 3)
